subcodes.first_line: O beloved Physician! Physical healing is accomplished through herbs and potions, elixirs and antidotes, yet remaineth temporary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب حبیب شفاء جسمانی بگیاهی و معجونی و خلاصه و دریاقی میسر گردد و موقت
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @humility; meekness; lowliness
